valid_submissions.notes: Kien anchor/control repeat; stable but below current 0.87 target.
Best result in this cycle; reproduces known 0.86 ceiling.
Wrapper for evanleri/nemotron-huikang-plus-b15e025-layered-rank32. Public score collapsed despite local notes suggesting promise.
Wrapper for evanleri/nemotron-b15e-best-adapter-checkpoint-4820-public. Better than layered but far below target.

errors_not_counted.notes: Kaggle scoring error; excluded from valid count under user rule.

direction_notes: Fresh Evan B15e/layered public adapters are not reliable paths to 0.87; both underperformed badly on public LB.
Kien/Huikang-family anchors remain the only stable 0.86 source found locally, but repeated packaging variants do not bridge to 0.87.
Rauffauzan wrapper/packaging variant scored 0.84, so compression or simple repackaging is not the missing improvement.

Next high-value work should prioritize genuinely new Huikang-based 0.87 leakage/signals from discussion/code updates or controlled adapter surgery around the known 0.86 anchor, not blind submission of new 3GB adapters.
process_notes: Stopped residual kaggle_submit_loop.py process after detecting unintended queue entries.
No active Nemotron submit process remained after cleanup.
Subagents confirmed no new trustworthy public 0.87 source was available; Evan wrappers were the only meaningful new adapter tests.
